headline: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky Says His X Account Was Hacked to Promote Asset Tokenization: 'Thanks for All the New Crypto Followers'
summary: Airbnb Inc. (NASDAQ:ABNB) CEO Brian Chesky said on Thursday his X account was hacked earlier this week, resulting in posts promoting real-world asset tokenization. The Hack Story A new X post from Chesky’s account read, “To the person who hacked my account earlier this week: thanks for all the new crypto followers. To my new crypto followers: I’m going to be a very disappointing follow.” It all started with an X thread on his account about real-world asset tokenization, which read, ” I’ve been q

headline: DeepSeek Champions China’s Bid to Flood the World With Cheap AI
summary: (Bloomberg) -- On a video conference call from Hangzhou earlier this year, one of China’s hottest startups held a four-hour pitch meeting with potential venture investors that was unusual by almost any measure. Only two representatives per institution were allowed. The majority of those present were getting a glimpse of the company’s leader for the very first time.Most Read from BloombergThailand Scraps Plan to End Visa-Free Entry for Indian TouristsBeckham’s IM8 Gets $1 Billion From General Cat
